title: NHKマイルカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So this is a G1 race... There's definitely a unique
atmosphere here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll be fine though. We only had dirt tracks
back in Kasamatsu, but I ran miles all the time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I like short-distance races. It's nice not having to
worry about anything other than running.
